text:
Created attachment 143777
texlive-base-20120701.patch

Many script files have invalid shebang lines.  This patch uses shebangfix
to fix that.

Also, make a space a tab to quiet portlint.

Port maintainer (hrs@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
